title: Pair VirtualService routing with DestinationRule subsets
description: Define subsets and traffic policy in a DestinationRule, then route to them by match conditions in a VirtualService, keeping hosts and ports aligned.
body: Use when routing traffic by version, header, or weight in the mesh. Do not reference a subset in a VirtualService that no DestinationRule defines, and keep host/port/gateway fields consistent. Actions: declare subsets (by pod labels like version) and connection policy in a DestinationRule, then in the VirtualService match on headers/uri and route to the named subsets with weights; ensure the host matches the Kubernetes service FQDN. Validation signals include requests reaching the intended subset confirmed by per-subset metrics and a header match routing as designed. Risk boundary: changing production route weights or hosts is human-gated.
